subject: Tiếng Anh 12
name: Part 5: Speaking
description: Thảo luận về ảnh hưởng của truyền thông

sections.heading: Speaking Skills
sections.content:
Chủ đề: Discussing media influence and fake news

Kỹ năng nói:

  • Talking about media types: Nói về các loại truyền thông
  • Describing media influence: Mô tả ảnh hưởng của truyền thông
  • Discussing fake news: Thảo luận về tin giả
  • Expressing opinions: Bày tỏ ý kiến
  • Using adverbial clauses: Sử dụng mệnh đề trạng ngữ

Useful expressions:

  • Talking about media use:
  • I get my news from...
  • I use social media to...
  • I follow... on Instagram/Twitter
  • I watch/read/listen to...
  • Describing influence:
  • Media influences people so much that...
  • Social media is so powerful that...
  • The news spread so quickly that...
  • It has such a strong influence that...
  • Discussing fake news:
  • Fake news is such a problem that...
  • People share information as if it were true.
  • We should verify news the way journalists do.
  • Misinformation spreads so fast that...
  • Expressing concerns:
  • I'm worried that...
  • One problem is that...
  • We need to be careful about...
  • It's concerning that...
  • Giving opinions:
  • In my opinion, ...
  • I think/believe that...
  • From my perspective...
  • I agree/disagree that...

sections.heading: Talking About Media Influence
sections.content:
Types of media people use:

  • Traditional media: TV, radio, newspapers, magazines
  • Digital media: news websites, online magazines
  • Social media: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, TikTok
  • Streaming platforms: YouTube, Netflix

How media influences us:

  • Shapes opinions: Media influences what we think about issues
  • Affects behavior: Advertising and influencers change how we act
  • Spreads information: News reaches millions quickly
  • Creates trends: Viral content shapes culture
  • Impacts mental health: Social media affects self-esteem

Discussing fake news:

  • What it is: False information presented as news
  • How it spreads: Shared quickly on social media
  • Why it's dangerous: Misleads people, affects decisions
  • How to identify it: Check sources, verify facts, look for bias
  • What we should do: Think critically, don't share unverified information

exercises.question: Which expression discusses media influence?
options: Media influences people so much that it shapes opinions
exercises.explanation: Câu này thảo luận về ảnh hưởng của truyền thông.

exercises.question: Complete: 'Social media is _____ powerful _____ it changes behavior.'
exercises.explanation: So + adj + that - mệnh đề kết quả.

exercises.question: Which phrase expresses a concern about fake news?
options: I'm worried that fake news misleads people
exercises.explanation: 'I'm worried that...' thể hiện lo ngại.

exercises.question: Complete: 'People share information _____ it _____ true.'
exercises.explanation: As if + Past Simple (were) - tình huống không có thật.

exercises.question: Which is a social media platform?
exercises.explanation: Instagram là nền tảng mạng xã hội.

exercises.question: Complete: 'We should verify news _____ journalists do.'
exercises.explanation: 'The way' dùng để diễn tả cách thức thực tế.

exercises.question: Which describes media influence?
exercises.explanation: 'Powerful' (mạnh mẽ) mô tả ảnh hưởng của truyền thông.

exercises.question: Complete: 'In my opinion, we _____ check sources before sharing.'
exercises.explanation: 'Should' thể hiện ý kiến rằng nên kiểm tra nguồn.

exercises.question: What should we do with unverified information?
exercises.explanation: Nên xác minh trước khi chia sẻ.

exercises.question: Complete: 'The news spread _____ quickly _____ millions saw it.'
exercises.explanation: So + adv + that - mệnh đề kết quả.

exercises.question: Which is traditional media?
exercises.explanation: Television (TV) là truyền thông truyền thống.

exercises.question: Complete: 'From my _____, media literacy is essential.'
exercises.explanation: 'From my perspective' nghĩa là theo quan điểm của tôi.

exercises.question: What does 'go viral' mean?
exercises.explanation: 'Go viral' nghĩa là lan truyền nhanh trên mạng.

exercises.question: Complete: 'We need to be careful _____ fake news.'
exercises.explanation: 'Be careful about' là cụm từ đúng.

exercises.question: Which phrase discusses media benefits?
options: Media connects people and spreads information
exercises.explanation: Câu này thảo luận về lợi ích của truyền thông.

exercises.question_text: Decide which are good ways to discuss media (True/False):
options: Social media is so powerful that it influences millions.
We should verify information before sharing.
Fake news has no impact at all.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Cách tốt dùng mệnh đề kết quả. b) False - Quá tiêu cực. c) True - Ý kiến đúng. d) False - Tin giả có tác động lớn.

exercises.question_text: Mark True if the expression is correct:
options: People share news as if it were verified.
Media influence people so much that it shapes opinions.
The news spread such quickly that millions saw it.
We should verify news the way journalists do.
exercises.explanation: a) True - as if + were. b) True - so + adv + that. c) False - phải là 'so quickly'. d) True - the way + clause.

exercises.question_text: Complete: Media is _____ powerful that it shapes opinions. (so/such)
exercises.explanation: So + adj + that - mệnh đề kết quả.

exercises.question_text: Complete the phrase: go _____ (related to spreading online)
exercises.explanation: 'Go viral' - lan truyền nhanh.

exercises.question_text: Complete: We should _____ sources before sharing. (verify/ignore)
exercises.explanation: Chúng ta nên xác minh (verify) nguồn trước khi chia sẻ.
